tog-lab.role: Software Engineering Full Stack | Project Manager
highlights: Development and maintenance of features for customer and sales management in a financial system focused on the agribusiness market
Backlog management and multidisciplinary team coordination as project manager
Co-creation of product and definition of strategic solutions aligned to agribusiness demands
Full stack development covering from the salesperson journey to intermediation with financial institutions
Development of backend features for a school management system serving all school networks in Brazil
Support to the database team in data modeling and structuring
Collaboration with the infrastructure team in the deployment and CI/CD process
Work with the requirements team in prioritizing and evaluating project activities
Development of SEO performance analysis and metrics system for a multinational retail leader
Integration with multiple Google Stack APIs (Search Console, Analytics, Merchant Center)
Definition of architectural standards and implementation of Clean Architecture in backend and frontend projects
Development of serverless automated systems on AWS focused on scalability
Development of scalable software for over 26,000 students and teachers from Brazilian public schools
Creation of a React JS component library adopted by 20+ developers across different projects
Definition of architectural standards and implementation of Clean Code and Clean Architecture best practices
Projects focused on learning recovery affected by the COVID-19 pandemic
Development of energy efficiency and sustainability systems for the world's largest metallurgical companies
Creation of frontend components with SOLID principles and list virtualization, improving performance and maintainability
Development of endpoints with statistical calculations for visualization in interactive tables and charts

tog-design.role: Software Engineering Trainee → Junior → Full Stack
highlights: Creation of a React JS component library with usage documentation for standardization across projects
Development of React micro frontends for a reference company in preventive and diagnostic medicine in Brazil
Implementation of web projects on Linux servers with Docker and Nginx
Progression from Trainee to Junior and Full Stack over 2 years and 4 months at the same company
Development of the responsive catalog system for Grupo Doce D'ocê (ultra-frozen foods)
Collaboration in defining behaviors and graphic interfaces for national and international projects
Maintenance of the Accord Iluminação system: implementation of a new page and bug fixes
